scripts.setup:server: cd server && ../.venv/bin/pip3 install -r requirements.txt && ../.venv/bin/python3 manage.py migrate
scripts.setup: npm run setup:venv && npm run setup:server && npm run setup:client
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd server && ../.venv/bin/python3 manage.py collectstatic --noinput
scripts.prestart: ([ -d .venv ] || npm run setup) && npm run build
scripts.db:restore-sample: cp server/boxer.sample.db server/boxer.db && echo 'Restored boxer.sample.db → boxer.db'
scripts.db:save-sample: cp server/boxer.db server/boxer.sample.db && echo 'Saved boxer.db → boxer.sample.db'
